commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an AsyncLocalStorage-backed active session-event context in the embedded agent runner, skips same-session hook queue waits during active event processing, and adds regression tests for active and detached hook paths.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +141. Total +180 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main can call beforeToolCall from inside _processAgentEvent while the same session _agentEventQueue promise is active.
